news_title: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ:HOLO) Anticipates Net Profit of Over RMB 230 Million for the First Half of 2025
summary: MicroCloud Hologram (NASDAQ:HOLO)expects to achieve a significant financial turnaround in H1 2025, projecting anet profit exceeding RMB 230 millioncompared to a net loss of RMB 120 million in H1 2024.The company specializes in holographic technology services, includingLiDAR solutions, digital twin technology, and ADAS systems. MicroCloud has announced plans toinvest over $400 millionin emerging technologies, including quantum computing, blockchain development, and artificial intelligence.
